headline: AWS teams working around the clock to keep Middle East services up after drone strikes, CEO says
summary: The Iran war has hit Amazon data centers in the region, and the company is working around the clock on availability, cloud chief Matt Garman said.

raw.headline: AWS teams working around the clock to keep Middle East services up after drone strikes, CEO says

headline: Vistra Is Capitalizing On America's Energy Boom; Growth Will Improve Valuation Sooner Or Later
summary: Vistra Corp. boosts 2026 guidance and 2027 cash flow outlook, citing rising power demand and growth capex. Learn more about VST stock here.
